inferFromTupleRestAndVariadic.tlua(22,36): error TLUA1005: ';' expected.
inferFromTupleRestAndVariadic.tlua(22,37): error TLUA1109: Expression expected.
inferFromTupleRestAndVariadic.tlua(22,38): error TLUA1109: Expression expected.


==== inferFromTupleRestAndVariadic.tlua (81 errors) ====
    // Crash when inferring from tuple types with rest and variadic elements
    // where the variadic element's constraint consumes all source tuple elements.
    // The pattern [...rest, ...T] where T is constrained by a fixed-size tuple
    // calls getElementTypeOfSliceOfTupleType which can return nil when the
    // source tuple is entirely consumed by T's implied arity.
    
    type SubTup<T> = T extends [
                               ~
!!! error TLUA1110: Type expected.
        ...(infer C)[],
        ~~~
!!! error TLUA1110: Type expected.
           ~
!!! error TLUA1005: ';' expected.
            ~~~~~
!!! error TLUA2304: Cannot find name 'infer'.
                  ~
!!! error TLUA1005: ')' expected.
                  ~
!!! error TLUA2304: Cannot find name 'C'.
                   ~
!!! error TLUA1128: Declaration or statement expected.
                    ~
!!! error TLUA1128: Declaration or statement expected.
                     ~
!!! error TLUA1128: Declaration or statement expected.
                      ~
!!! error TLUA1128: Declaration or statement expected.
        ...infer B extends [any, any]
           ~~~~~
!!! error TLUA1005: ';' expected.
           ~~~~~
!!! error TLUA2304: Cannot find name 'infer'.
                 ~
!!! error TLUA1434: Unexpected keyword or identifier.
                 ~
!!! error TLUA2304: Cannot find name 'B'.
                   ~~~~~~~
!!! error TLUA1128: Declaration or statement expected.
                           ~
!!! error TLUA1128: Declaration or statement expected.
                            ~~~
!!! error TLUA2693: 'any' only refers to a type, but is being used as a value here.
                            ~~~
!!! error TLUA2695: Left side of comma operator is unused and has no side effects.
                                 ~~~
!!! error TLUA2693: 'any' only refers to a type, but is being used as a value here.
                                    ~
!!! error TLUA1005: ';' expected.
    ] ? B : never;
    ~
!!! error TLUA1128: Declaration or statement expected.
      ~
!!! error TLUA1128: Declaration or statement expected.
        ~
!!! error TLUA1434: Unexpected keyword or identifier.
        ~
!!! error TLUA2304: Cannot find name 'B'.
          ~
!!! error TLUA1128: Declaration or statement expected.
            ~~~~~
!!! error TLUA2693: 'never' only refers to a type, but is being used as a value here.
    type Trigger = SubTup<[1, 2]>;
                   ~~~~~~~
!!! error TLUA2314: Generic type 'SubTup' requires 1 type argument(s).
                          ~
!!! error TLUA1005: '>' expected.
                            ~
!!! error TLUA1005: ']' expected.
                               ~
!!! error TLUA1005: ';' expected.
                                ~
!!! error TLUA1109: Expression expected.
                                 ~
!!! error TLUA1109: Expression expected.

    type SubTup2<T> = T extends [
                                ~

          ~
!!! error TLUA1128: Declaration or statement expected.
            ~~~~~

    type Trigger2 = SubTup2<[1, 2]>;
                    ~~~~~~~~
